files.description: Architectural guidelines (SRP, DIP, SoC, ADP, etc.), coding patterns, testing standards, and DCO/licensing requirements.
PR checklist: contributing guidelines, test coverage, documentation, docker-compose/Helm parity.
Enforced pre-commit hooks: Black (120 char), Flake8 (120 char), trailing whitespace, large file checks, AST validation, debug statement detection.
Extended Flake8 configuration with per-file ignores, isort settings, and coding style rules.
Code ownership: nv-ingest-maintainers and nemo-retriever-research own everything; specialized teams for docs, devops, CI.
High-level architecture overview of the ingestion pipeline, scaling modes, and system design.
Shared API package dependencies. This is the lowest-level package; its dependencies constrain the entire monorepo.
Client library dependencies. Must remain lightweight since external users install this package independently.
PR CI pipeline: pre-commit checks, Docker build and test with coverage.
